case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. KEVIN KING et al

docket_entries.description: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT KING, KEVIN HEARING SET FOR APR-22-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT KEVIN KING'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO THE STANDING ARGUMENT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE BASIS OF THE CONTRACT CLAIM. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FURTHER FACTS AS TO THIS CLAIM WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF PLTF'S OPPOS; POS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT KEVIN KING'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Kevin King (no phone number provided) defendant and moving party appearing in propria persona. No other appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: overruled as to the standing argument. Defendant's demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the basis of the contract claim. Plaintiff must plead further facts as to this claim within 10 days of notice of entry of this order. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-22-2011 Continued To Apr-28-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT KEVIN KING'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OF PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC.

APPEARANCES: Kevin King, 568-6359 deft & moving party in propria persona (did not comply with the tentative ruling rule re giving proper notice to opposing party of his intent to appear at the hearing); no other appearances.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling and continued the matter to 04/28/11 at 9:30am for argument. Defendant to give notice. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
